taxonomy: Hymenophyllum bakeri is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This family is a part of the larger division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns. The Hymenophyllaceae family is often referred to as the "filmy ferns" due to the delicate and lacy nature of their fronds. Within the Hymenophyllaceae family, Hymenophyllum bakeri is classified as a genus, with the full classification being Hymenophyllum bakeri, Hymenophyllaceae, Pteridophyta, Plantae.
